trades.reasoning: Score dropped to 30 with MACD bearish and price below SMA-20; small gain available, better to rotate capital into higher-scoring names.
Score 30, bearish MACD, and sitting below avg cost — cutting the loss early to redeploy into stronger momentum names.
Score 90 with RSI in bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover, and price above SMA-20 — strongest unowned name on the screener.
Score 65, RSI in bullish zone, and price just above SMA-20 — reasonable risk/reward with 5 slots still to fill after AMZN.

decisions.briefing: Markets pulled back modestly today (NASDAQ -0.9%, S&P -0.4%), creating a neutral-to-cautious tone. I rotated out of COIN and NVDA, both scoring just 30 with bearish MACD and prices below their 20-day averages, to free up roughly $3,500 in capital. That cash plus existing cash goes into AMZN (top-tier score 90) and MSTR (score 65), keeping us active and filling open slots while staying in names with confirmed momentum.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities dipped modestly on April 23, 2026, with the NASDAQ falling 0.9% and the S&P 500 sliding 0.4%, as investors digested mixed corporate earnings and lingering uncertainty around Federal Reserve rate policy. Tech stocks bore the brunt of selling pressure, with growth names seeing profit-taking after recent gains. The broader tone was cautious but not panicked — a 'wait and see' session ahead of more earnings reports and economic data.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於2026年4月23日小幅回落，納斯達克指數下跌0.9%，標普500指數跌0.4%，市場在消化參差不齊的企業業績之際，亦持續觀望聯儲局的利率走向。科技成長股受到較大沽壓，投資者趁近期升浪獲利回吐。整體市場情緒審慎，但並未出現恐慌性拋售，屬於靜待更多財報及經濟數據的觀望盤局。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum rotation means selling stocks that are losing their upward momentum (falling MACD, price below moving averages) and reinvesting that capital into stocks showing stronger momentum signals. Investors do this to keep their portfolio aligned with where market strength actually is, rather than holding on to weakening positions hoping they recover. Today we rotated out of COIN and NVDA (both score 30, bearish) and into AMZN (score 90, bullish) for exactly this reason.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能輪動（Momentum Rotation）是指賣出上升動能減弱的股票（例如MACD轉跌、股價跌破移動平均線），並將資金重新投入動能更強的標的。投資者透過這種操作，讓組合持續聚焦於市場強勢板塊，而非死守弱勢股等待反彈。今日我們賣出評分僅30分、技術訊號偏空的COIN及NVDA，轉而買入評分高達90分的AMZN，正是動能輪動策略的實踐。
